title: Expose scan state globally via composable
Windows Compatibility: Fix minor path and temp file issues
description: Fix PATH separator (use path.delimiter), use os.tmpdir() for temp files, handle Windows admin elevation

title: Windows Compatibility: Add Windows terminal definitions and detection
description: Add CMD, PowerShell, Windows Terminal, Git Bash definitions and Windows-specific terminal opening logic

title: Linux: Add Linux to CI build-distributables matrix
description: .github/workflows/ci.yml build-distributables job matrix only has macos-latest and windows-latest. Add ubuntu-latest to catch Linux build regressions. Add corresponding electron-builder --linux step. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #8.

title: Linux: Fix clipboard bridge UTI for file URLs
description: src/main/ipc/clipboard-bridge.ts uses macOS UTI public.file-url for clipboard.writeBuffer(). On Linux the correct MIME type is text/uri-list. Currently a silent failure - nothing is copied. Fix: use platform check to select correct MIME type. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #6.

title: MCP: expose project accounts (metadata only, no passwords)
description: Add list_project_accounts and open_project_accounts MCP tools. List returns account metadata without the password field. Open focuses the Electron window to the project's Accounts tab so the user can retrieve the password themselves rather than the password ever reaching the model's context.

title: Linux: Provide colored tray icon variant
description: src/main/tray-manager.ts only has tray-iconTemplate.png (macOS template image convention). setTemplateImage(true) is no-op on Linux. Monochrome icon may render poorly on some Linux panel themes. Consider providing a colored PNG variant and selecting based on platform. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #11.

title: Fix BrowserWindow.skipTaskbar type error (TS2551) in main process
description:
`npm run type-check` reports TS2551 errors because code reads `win.skipTaskbar` as a property, but Electron's `BrowserWindow` only exposes it as a setter method `setSkipTaskbar()` (no public getter). This is a pre-existing bug (confirmed present on main before the `ports` branch's main.ts changes), now appearing in 3 places using the identical "find the real main window" filter idiom:

- src/main/main.ts:216 (new `second-instance` handler filter, added 2026-06-18)
- src/main/main.ts:263 (existing `activate` handler filter)
- src/main/ipc/window-bridge.ts:10 (existing filter)

All three use this expression to distinguish main app windows from utility windows (tray popup, etc):
```ts
win => !win.isDestroyed() && !win.skipTaskbar && win.isResizable() && !win.isAlwaysOnTop()
```

Since `skipTaskbar` has no getter, this comparison is bogus at the type level (TS reports "Did you mean 'setSkipTaskbar'?"). At runtime it likely works by accident (JS lets you read an undefined property, so `!win.skipTaskbar` is always `true` — meaning the filter currently never actually excludes anything based on this condition, relying solely on `isResizable()` and `isAlwaysOnTop()` to distinguish main windows from the tray popup).

Confirmed via `npm run type-check`: 54 pre-existing errors on main before this branch's changes, 55 after (the one new occurrence at main.ts:216).

title: Create TitleBar scanner component with start/cancel button
Linux: Fix PATH not inherited in packaged app
description: src/main/main.ts only runs shell PATH fix for darwin. Linux Electron apps launched from .desktop files or AppImage have the same problem - git, node, npm won't be found. Fix: extend the process.platform === darwin check to also include linux. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #2.

title: Linux: Enable Linux in release workflow
description: .github/workflows/release.yml has Linux matrix entry commented out. Uncomment to publish Linux artifacts (AppImage, deb, rpm) so auto-updater works for Linux users. electron-builder.yml already has Linux targets configured. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #9.

title: Windows Compatibility: Create cross-platform build script
description: Replace bash build-production.sh with Node.js script that works on Windows

title: Add gitEmails default to settings service
Create GitEmailsSetting Vue component
Fix updater to not show error when new update dmg isn't found or wait for new version to be at least 30 minutes old
description: The updater should either gracefully handle when a DMG isn't available yet, or wait for the new version to be at least 30 minutes old before checking for it

title: Linux: Exclude Linux system dirs from directory search
description: src/backend/routes/system.ts directory search excludes macOS dirs (Library, System, Applications, Volumes) but not Linux ones. Add snap to exclusion list for cleaner home dir scans. Note: dotfiles already excluded by startsWith dot check. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #10.

title: Update git stats service for multi-email support
Windows Compatibility: Add Windows IDE detection paths
description: Add Windows Program Files paths for IDE detection, improve where command fallback

title: Linux: Add safeStorage fallback when keyring unavailable
description: src/backend/utils/key-manager.ts throws if safeStorage.isEncryptionAvailable() is false. On Linux without gnome-keyring/libsecret/kwallet this hard-fails with no recovery. Fix: provide degraded mode - warn user, skip encryption features, or use file-based fallback. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #5.

title: Add GitEmailsSetting to Settings view
Linux: Replace user-agent platform detection in TitleBar
description: src/frontend/components/nav/molecules/TitleBar.vue uses navigator.userAgent.includes(mac) for platform detection. Works currently but fragile. Replace with process.platform check exposed via preload bridge. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #13.

title: Detect package.json/composer.json scripts in immediate subdirectories
description: ProjectPackageService only checks project root. Add one-level-deep subdir scan (reusing ignore list from project-scanner-service.ts) returning DetectedScriptGroup[] with relativeDir. File: src/backend/services/project/project-package-service.ts

title: Verify: type-check, lint, manual test of custom commands + monorepo detection
description: Run npm run type-check && npm run lint. Manually test via npm run dev: root-only project regression check, monorepo subdir detection, custom command persistence in Advanced mode, existing suggestion selection still works

title: Fix AutocompleteInput to support free-text custom values
description: ComboboxRoot's modelValue is selection-state only; typed text that doesn't match a suggestion is discarded. Need v-model:search-term wiring + reset-search-term-on-blur/select disabled. Affects 5 usages, root fix in src/frontend/components/molecules/AutocompleteInput.vue

title: Windows Compatibility: Disable CLI on Windows
description: Add platform check to disable CLI features on Windows, hide menu items, show not available message

title: Windows Compatibility: Create platform utilities helper module
description: Create src/shared/utils/platform.ts with DRY helpers for platform detection, clipboard, file manager commands

title: Windows Compatibility: Refactor clipboard and file manager to use platform helpers
description: Update copy-path.ts, open-in-terminal.ts, open-in-finder.ts to use shared platform utilities

title: Add GIT_EMAILS to SETTING_KEYS in shared types
Update package-scripts/composer-scripts/package-manager routes for grouped scripts
description: Update routes in src/backend/routes/projects/packages.ts to call new *ScriptGroups methods and return grouped shape; add subPath query param to package-manager route

title: Linux: Fix hosts file write using osascript (macOS-only)
description: src/backend/routes/system.ts and src/cli/commands/hosts.ts both use osascript in the else branch for non-Windows. osascript is macOS-only and will fail on Linux with command not found. Fix: add Linux branch using pkexec mv (Polkit) with sudo mv fallback. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #1.

title: Move project scanner progress to TitleBar
Remove toast notifications from scanner
Linux: Add solid background fallback for tray popup
description: src/main/tray-popup-manager.ts uses vibrancy: menu (macOS-only, ignored on Linux). Combined with transparent: true, popup might be invisible without a compositor on minimal Linux WMs. Add solid background color fallback when not on macOS. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #12.

title: Linux: Add CLI terminal detection for Linux terminals
description: src/cli/utils/terminal-detector.ts detectCurrentTerminal() only checks env vars for macOS terminals. On Linux it always returns null so open-in-terminal always falls back to copy-cd-command. Add detection for: GNOME Terminal (GNOME_TERMINAL_SCREEN/VTE_VERSION), Konsole (KONSOLE_VERSION), and general TERM_PROGRAM. Also update getTerminalName() map. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #4.

title: Remove scan button and status from Projects.vue
Windows Compatibility: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow
description: Set up CI workflow for Windows builds and tests

title: Update git stats route to pass emails from settings
Wire grouped scripts into useQueries and ProcessConfigEditor UI
description: Update useProjectPackageScriptsQuery/useProjectComposerScriptsQuery/useProjectPackageManagerQuery in useQueries.ts for DetectedScriptGroup[]; update ProcessConfigEditor.vue Quick Setup to render grouped sections, set workingDir on generated StartProcess, update selectedScripts keying

title: Implement Cmd+F search functionality using built-in findInPage API
task
Linux: Add Wayland and xsel clipboard fallbacks
description: src/shared/utils/platform.ts getClipboardCommand() only uses xclip with no fallback. Modern Ubuntu/Fedora default to Wayland where xclip may not work. Fix: check WAYLAND_DISPLAY env var and use wl-copy for Wayland, fall back to xclip then xsel for X11. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #3.

title: Linux: Add libsql linux-x64 placeholder to build script
description: scripts/build-production.mjs and CI only create @libsql/darwin-x64 placeholder. When building on/for Linux, also need @libsql/linux-x64-gnu placeholder. Same fix needed in .github/workflows/ci.yml build-distributables job. See docs/linux-compatibility.md issue #7.
